## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Testing
- [ ] Frontend tests pass
- [ ] Backend tests pass
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked related issue(s)
- [ ] I updated docs when needed
- [ ] CI checks are green
